verse.name: v1
verse.lines: A new day has dawned And I know not what it brings But somehow I feel I'm almost home Not turning back to yesterday But pressing towards my high calling I can hear my theophany calling me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Can't you hear Your theophany calling you It's a sign it's almost home time And I'm just waiting For my promised body change For soon I know We'll be with Him on high

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The whole earth is groaning And travailing in pain But we as the bride Have been glorified in Him Saints, even though we may suffer Stand, and gird your loins For your perfection, draweth near
